content: Phase 6 image rejection rules developed this session: (1) reject 'view FROM ship' when deck rail visible or ship-bow-corner only visible in foreground (subject is the vista, not the ship); (2) reject multi-ship compositions where target ship is smaller than other ships (e.g., MS_Marina_and_MV_Britannia — Britannia dominates); (3) reject Cavour_in_Civitavecchia-style panoramas where an Italian Navy carrier or unrelated foreground vessel dominates; (4) reject '(cropped)' duplicates that show same scene as parent minus context; (5) reject Costa-livery photos on Carnival Firenze/Venezia page (post-rebrand livery differs); (6) sideways EXIF requires manual PIL.Image.rotate(-90, expand=True) after ImageOps.exif_transpose when EXIF orientation is missing.
